failedAssertions.reason: The observed lifecycle went draft -> failed after launch, skipping persona_review/ready/queued/running.
The real study Personas tab stayed at 0 accepted variants and Generate variants surfaced a server error requiring run budget 50-100.
Draft studies are launchable from the real overview page; the UI showed Launch Study and started the launch flow instead of blocking while draft.
Launching a draft study with missing variants visibly transitioned to failed instead of persona_review.
The real /api/run-progress endpoint returned 500 misconfigured_callback_secret for an invalid token request instead of 401 invalid_callback_token.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded study-orchestrator user-testing findings about the hidden 50-100 runBudget requirement, the missing Convex CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET, and the agent-browser form-submit automation workaround.
